raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need to cat binary? Use od -f? For double: use od -An -t f8? Actually od -An -t f8 prints double. So command: od -An -t f8 /workspace/dir1/long.txt. Maybe use hexdump? But requirement: display dump as floating point values of double size. So: od -An -t f8 /workspace/dir1/long.txt.
